roa.docketEntryComment: Consolidated Complaint
Amended Complaint
Complaint
PEOPLE'S MOT TO CONTINUE PRELIM (IN S27) FILED
DEF ATTNY MOT FOR CONTINUANCE FILED TODAY
PEOPLE'S OPP TO CO-D BELL'S MTS/TRAV SW FILED
DA'S MOTION TO JOIN DEFENDANTS, P & A, DEC OF H DORFMAN FILED
/CAL: DA MOTION TO CONTINUE PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:CAUSE IS TRANSFERRED TODEPARTMENT 26 AT 3:30P,M, TO BE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE ULMER FOR DA MOTION TO CONTINUE PRELIMINARY HEARING ,/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE THE PRELIMINARY HEARING BASED ON DEFENSE COUNSEL FRANZ FUETSCH BEING IN TRIAL,/CTORD:MATTER ASSIGNED TO JUDGE RICHARD ULMER FOR SETTING OF THE PRELIMINARY HEARING/CGTW/TE:10 DAYS/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO CONTINUE ON BEHALF OF CO-DEFENDANT MONTRAIL BRACKENS/X:COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE THE PRELIMINARY HEARING BASED ON MR,FRANZ FUETSCH'S PERSONAL URGENT CARE FOR HIS ELDERLY MOTHER,/VD:PRELIMINARY HEARING OF 03-10-14/CGTW/TE:10 DAYS/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO CONTINUE ON BEHALF OF CO-DEFENDANT CATHERINE UONG IS GRANTED WITHOUT OPPOSITION,/CGTW/TE:10 DAYS/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:HOBBS MOTION - MOTION TO UNSEAL AFFIDAVITS IN SUPPORT OF SEARCH WARRANTS/MO GRTD/CTORD:PEOPLE TO PROVIDE AFFIDAVITS TO DEFENDANTS BY 7-30-13/CTORD:PEOPLE TO PROVIDE ANY UPDATED (UP TO 7-19-13) INVESTIGATOR'S CHRONOLOGY OF INVESTIGATION REPORTS TO DEFENSE/CTORD:DEFENDANT'S TO PROVIDE THE COURT A CHART OF DISCOVERY THAT IS STILL OUTSTANDING BY 8-6-13/X:FURTHER DISCOVERY COMPLIANCE HRG IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL:FUR DISCOVERY COMPLIANCE & HOBBS MOTION/X:HOBB'S MOTION TO BE FILED BY DEFENSE BY 7-15-13 AS TO 15 SEARCH WARRANTS, DEFENDANT'S DO NOT NEED TO FILE EACH MOTION SEPARATELY OR IN FRONT OF DIFFERENT JUDGES/CONTD:HOBBS MOTION/
/CAL:FUR DISCOVERY COMPLIANCE/CTORD:THE PEOPLE ARE TO PROVIDE THE UNSEALEDPORTION OF WARRANTS TO  DEFENSE COUNSEL BY 6-28-13/CONTD:FURTHER DISCOVERY COMPLIANCE 7-1 & 8-6/
/CAL:TO SET & DISCOVERY COMPLIANCE & WRITING EXEMPLAR/DAWT/CONTD:FURTHER DISCOVERY COMPLIANCE/X:THE COURT WILL ISSUE A MINUTE ORDER REGARDING HANDWRITING EXAMPLAR AFTER REVIEWAL OF 2-4-13 TRANSCRIPT/

/CAL:TO SET & MOTION TO COMPEL HANDWRITING SAMPLE/MO GRTD/CTORD:ALL DEFENDANTS TO PROVIDE WRITING EXEMPLAR/X:THE COURT IS NOT RULINGON ADMISSIBILITYOF EXEMPLARS AND THE MOTION IS GRANTED WITHOUT  PREJUDICE TO DEFENDANTS' 4TH AMENDMENT DEFENSES /CTORD:EXEMPLARS ARE TO BE IN CURSIVE, PRINT AND NUMERICAL, THE PEOPLE TO PROVIDE NOTICE REGARDING THE DATE EXEMPLARS ARE TO BETAKEN, COUNSELS AND INVESTIGATORS MAY BE PRESENT/CONTD:TO SET/
/CAL:DA MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE/MO GRTD/X:CONSOLIDATED FELONY COMPLAINT FILED IN OPEN COURT TODAY/STWPX/CONTD TO BE SET, DOP /CONTD:TO SET & MOT TO COMPEL HANDWRITING SAMPLE/DOP/
/CAL:DISCOVERY STATUS/X:NOTICE OF MOTION & MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANTS TOPROVIDE A HANDWRITING SAMPLE FILED IN COURT,/CONTD:DA MOTION CONSOLIDATE &MOTION TO COMPEL HANDWRITING SAMPLE/DOP/

/CAL TO SET/X DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT IS GANTED,/X:FIRST AMENDED FELONY COMPLAINT IS FILED IN OPEN COURT,/X:THE COURT FORMALLY ARRAIGNS THE DEFENDANT ON THE AMENDED COMPLAINT,/X:DEFENDANT ENTERS A PLEA OF NOT GUILTY,/CONTD:DISCOVERY STATUS/DOP/

/X:PD DECLARES CONFLICT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/CON:DAVIDSIMERLY/DEFTARR1/NTW60/X:DEFENDANT IS FORMALLY ARRAIGNED AND DENIES ALL ALLEGATIONS/LD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 60TH 02-11-13/987,2/BAIL:2000000//X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD TO BE SET, DOP/CONTD:TO SET AND TO JOIN COD/DOP/
/CAL:DISM BY PEOPLE TO PROCEED ON INDICTMENT/MO PC 1385:DEFENDANT INDICTEDBY GRAND JURY/
/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: PER JUDGE CHAN/

/CAL:TO SET PX/X:ESTIMATE TEN DAYS/NTW60/LD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 08-04-14/CONTD:PRELIM HRG/DOP/
